sentences.english: Let me tell you about my family.
There are four people in my family — my parents, my older sister, and me.
sentences.korean: 가족이 네 명인데 — 부모님, 언니, 저예요.

sentences.english: My dad works as an engineer at a car company.
He's really good with machines and he loves fixing things around the house.
sentences.korean: 기계를 정말 잘 다루시고 집안 수리하는 걸 좋아하세요.

sentences.english: My mom is a kindergarten teacher.
sentences.korean: 엄마는 유치원 선생님인데, 아주 인내심 있고 창의적이세요.

quiz.question: What does '우리는 매우 가까운 사이야' mean in English?
options: There are ~ people in my family.

sentences.korean: 엄마는 유치원 선생님이에요 아주 인내심 있고 창의적이에요

sentences.english: She always makes beautiful art projects with her students.
sentences.korean: 항상 학생들과 아름다운 미술 작품을 만드세요.

sentences.english: My older sister's name is Jina.
sentences.korean: 언니 이름은 지나인데, 25살이고 서울의 마케팅 회사에서 일해요.

sentences.english: She's twenty-five and works at a marketing company in Seoul.
We're very close even though she doesn't live at home anymore.
sentences.korean: 언니가 더 이상 집에 살지 않지만 아주 가까워요.

sentences.english: We video-call each other almost every day.
I'm the youngest in the family.
Everyone says I look like my dad, but I have my mom's personality — warm and a little bit talkative.
sentences.korean: 모두 아빠를 닮았다고 하는데, 성격은 엄마를 닮았어요 — 따뜻하고 약간 수다스러운 편이에요.

quiz.question: What does '인내심 있는' mean in English?
options: There are ~ people in my family.
